svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 250, 255), rgb(19, 23, 27)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(31, 119, 180), rgb(84, 159, 212));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 41px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1f77b4;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1f77b4, #549fd4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Simulator
Pygame-based robot navigation simulation with real-time visualization and logging.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 250, 255), rgb(19, 23, 27)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(44, 160, 44), rgb(57, 156, 57));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 41px; margin-left: 351px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #2ca02c;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#2ca02c, #399c39); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
MLP Trainer
Tkinter GUI for training imitation learning models from JSONL logs.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 250, 255), rgb(19, 23, 27)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(140, 86, 75), rgb(191, 145, 135));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 41px; margin-left: 701px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #8c564b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#8c564b, #bf9187); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
PPO Trainer
Tkinter GUI for fine-tuning models with reinforcement learning.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 250, 255), rgb(19, 23, 27)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(23, 190, 207), rgb(0, 133, 148));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 41px; margin-left: 1051px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #17becf;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#17becf, #008594); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Benchmark GUI
Tool for generating benchmark maps and evaluating model performance.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 250, 255), rgb(19, 23, 27)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(227, 119, 194), rgb(179, 86, 151));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 41px; margin-left: 1401px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #e377c2;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#e377c2, #b35697); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Headless Sim
Non-GUI simulation environment used by PPO for parallel training.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 250, 255), rgb(19, 23, 27)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 39, 40), rgb(255, 140, 141));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 41px; margin-left: 1751px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #d62728;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#d62728, #ff8c8d); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
JSONL Logs
Recorded sensor/action data from the simulator.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 41px; margin-left: 2101px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #9467bd;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#9467bd, #a17ac4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Trained Models
JSON files containing MLP weights, biases, and normalization parameters.
